programme.desc: The Poseidon crew members receive devastating news about their mining permits. The Dust Devils gamble big on a huge quartz reef and Shane and Russell strike gold

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard visits a Welsh castle to solve a centuries-old salvage mystery, but finding hidden treasure proves trickier than expected. He also learns that in nearby Somerset, a school is clearing out its storage areas

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Upholsterer Sonnaz Nooranvary takes on a real labour of love, a battered but beloved armchair that holds treasured memories of owner Michelle's grandfather. Brother-and-sister team, clockmaker Steve Fletcher and saddle maker Suzie Fletcher, turn their hand to restoring a First World War-era military riding crop for a family with a proud military tradition. Plus, ceramics conservator Kirsten Ramsay tackles one her toughest assignments yet, a damaged ornate Hungarian vase, with a complex design and intricate decoration

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers
programme.desc: Sculptor Nick attempts the restoration of a rare piece of folk history. Meanwhile, leather restorer Martin is brought a globe-trotting antique luxury French travelling trunk

programme.title: Hunting Hitler
programme.desc: While investigating makeshift runways as an escape from Berlin by air, the team finds reason to believe Hitler faked his death and headed towards Spain

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ramy Romany investigates whether King Tutankhamun's mummified remains were burnt from a change in the mummification process

programme.title: What On Earth?
programme.desc: A strange mass breaches the ocean surface near Antarctica - is it a sea monster? Ancient rock carvings in a remote mountain range depict unearthly beings

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: The crew creates a chopper for a medical transport company, but struggles with the challenge of working out how to fit an ambulance stretcher into a sidecar

programme.title: Desert Car Kings
programme.desc: Ron tries to enter a Pontiac GTO to a collectors' show., but faces an uphill struggle with only a shell to work on and an alarming lack of spare parts to choose from

programme.title: Devonport: Inside the Royal Navy
programme.desc: Captain Anderson oversees a test of a 4.5 inch gun on HMS Sutherland, the most modern Frigate in the Royal Navy. Meanwhile, marriage and departures leave an emotional strain

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Where materials come from and how manufacturing processes have developed over the years, featuring race car oil tanks, plaster mouldings, lemongrass oil and fly-tying vises

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Where materials come from and how manufacturing processes have developed over the years, featuring coconut charcoal, dial indicators, wet downdraft tables and bassoon reeds

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hospital theatre practitioner Geoff Conway holds the first dinner party in Wigan, hoping his nine-course Spanish tapas feast will impress his fellow diners and secure him the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Outgoing hair salon owner Natalie Crompton hosts the second dinner party in Wigan, and since she loves to party she plans a fun-filled night for her guests - including some very special treats

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Music teacher and funeral singer Alan Gregory hosts the third dinner party in Wigan, and lines up an evening of Greek food for his guests. However, his plans for a cultured soiree are soon spoiled by straight-talking Geoff Conway, who seems intent on causing arguments

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Gymnastics teacher Simon Grimwood is hoping to host a special evening on the fourth night of the contest in Wigan, Greater Manchester, because it is his birthday. The other contestants also discover his secret lifelong passion for ferreting

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nurse practitioner Caroline Heaven hosts the final night in Wigan, hoping to end the week by showing her guests a 'proper Lancashire night'. However, hospital theatre manager Geoff Conway is on the verge of being thrown out if he continues his run of misbehaviour. At the end of proceedings the winner of the £1,000 is revealed

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman attempts to find a dream home in Barbados for husband and wife Julie and John, who have a budget of £300,000

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. Just B is first, and owners Karen and Geoff get some answers while hearing the truth from guests on their hair-raising stay

programme.desc: In Almeria, Sharon and Steve meet Rex and Karen from Boston in the USA, who have decided to move to Spain after falling in love with the lifestyle. Karen used to be an estate agent, so she knows exactly what she wants for her 350,000 euros. In Alicante, Linda and her daughter Charlotte also have their work cut out with clients Barbara and Russell from Tamworth, who are looking for a holiday home near the beach for scuba diving enthusiast Russell, on a budget of 130,000 euros

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. Martin and Sherry consider ending their relationship, while Frasier scores a notable success on the romantic front, dating three women in one weekend. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and Marsha Mason

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Crane brothers congratulate themselves on getting rid of Sherry - but like the proverbial bad penny, she soon turns up again, determined not to let Martin go without a fight. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. In order to save the struggling Italian restaurant from disaster, he must persuade harassed owner Julie to co-operate with the head chef, and work his magic on a menu that relies heavily on a microwave

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton is on the Costa Calida in Spain, with Nadine, who is looking to permanently relocate to Spain with her husband Tyler. Nadine's best friend Jannette is coming on the search to offer a helping hand as shows the friends five properties within the budget of £160,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Best friends for over 20 years, Julie and Jan from Tyne and Wear have had several holidays on the island of Lanzarote. They're now dreaming of owning a bolthole on the island to enjoy with their friends and families and have a budget of £115,000 between them. Jasmine Harman joins them on the Canary Island and shows them five properties to consider, all around the Puerto del Carmen area

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesn't react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later he's still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Tom's iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team return for an eleventh series. In the first episode, a tiny Jackahuahua puppy is in need of emergency spinal surgery after being attacked by a dog in the park, but it is not certain that he will be able to get back on his feet again after the operation. Elsewhere, a Bernese has a rare cyst in his elbow, requiring a challenging operation for removal, and an excitable Labrador requires elbow replacement surgery, which will result in a long and difficult road to recovery

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode's patients include a builder who fell into a hole on the site, dislocating his shoulder and leaving the bone painfully wedged against his ribs. It is an injury that Chris has never seen before in the 30 years she has worked in emergency medicine. Elsewhere, a woman who has collapsed twice within a week and an ex-convict who has had a seizure are also brought in for treatment

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels across the United States in search of restaurants in dire need of renovation - and after analysing their situation, he has just 24 hours to bring them back from the brink of disaster. His first stop is the New York community of Congers, where he hopes to save family-run Italian restaurant Bella Gianna's. Gordon and his team work round the clock to clean the premises, remodel the interior and revamp the menu, while also teaching the staff to prepare new dishes and work together as an efficient unit. What will the customers think of the new-look restaurant?

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Kerry Godliman take on Jon Richardson and Joe Wilkinson in the classic words and numbers quiz, while Mr Swallow - aka Nick Mohammed - joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more singletons to choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. First up is 25-year-old Hope, a model from Birmingham. A huge wrestling fan, she is keen to find a man who can finally pin her down. She is followed by 28-year-old veterinary student Kurt, a real-life Dr Doolittle who can talk to the animals but gets tongue-tied speaking to women. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ann-Marie Hamilton hosts day two in Eastbourne, where she plans to entertain her guests by singing in her garden. Fellow contestant Russell makes a lot of jokes, but foodie Adam does not seem amused

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Raconteur Russell Turnbull hosts the final night in Eastbourne, East Sussex. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the coastal community of Long Beach, California, to save an Italian restaurant that was opened in 1958 and now under the misguided leadership of Nino, who blamed by brother Michael and sister Carina for the eatery's failings. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul, Steve and Ben make a shocking discovery when they break into a home in Essex while serving an eviction notice on a single mother and her two children. Meanwhile, Stewart and Iain receive more than just threats from the staff and owner of a taxi business, a car dealer has to choose between paying up or losing his showroom stars, and an Indian restaurant owner is in danger of losing his livelihood

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul Bohill and Steve and Ben Pinner face their biggest eviction yet - taking on squatters in a large central London office block. With the help of the police, they try to remove a suspected group of 70 from the building, but with a barricade in place, the team faces a challenging operation ahead. Elsewhere, officers are confronted by an army of family and friends when they attempt to enforce a writ at the property of a debtor, and face a difficult eviction at the north London home of a heavily pregnant tenant and her family, after the council fails to pay the rent to the landlord

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary giving an insight into cash-strapped Britain from the perspectives of debtors, creditors and those who collect the payments, including High Court enforcement bailiffs and repossession teams. Paul and Ben are called in to evict squatters from a residential property, but something about the squat does not quite add up for the team

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Brian O'Shaughnessy and Graham Aldred's first case sees them in a Brighton health spa as they search for assets to seize in pursuit of a £20,000 debt. Following a stand-off, they devise a way to work with the owner and her professional advisers to come up with a solution. Later, Graham reveals his softer side when he revisits a woman who defaulted on a debt payment plan

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve's first job is an eviction with a twist when they find out the landlord is the tenant's son, while their next case is also tricky and involves family members with a question mark over their immigration status who are now facing homelessness. Their final case involves a man with a history of mental illness who has reached the end of his tenancy but refuses to leave, and Steve tries to find a solution after a church minister and his mother fail to placate him

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord seeks urgent advice from eviction specialist Chris after finding his three-bedroom terrace has been stripped bare of the fittings, the flooring, and even the grass on the lawn. Landlady Rose gets a shock when she finally gains access to her property, and Dave from Peterborough Council's housing team comes across some of the worst damp and mould he has ever seen. Plus, Selina and Lee must return from America for a court case to recover £10,000 rent arrears on their UK property

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Kate faces trouble from unruly tenants, who became anti-social, and are now trying to sue her for serving them an eviction notice. Dhiren relates how the existing tenant of a house he bought stopped paying rent as soon as he took ownership, and Tim explains how a health scare left him seeking to sell his property - but a standing occupant refused to leave

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Claire and Simon seek eviction specialist Chris's help to evict a man claiming to be renting their old family home. Plus, a man is almost £30,000 in debt and in danger of repossession after his tenants stopped paying the rent

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House

This week, the Caddy family of Bristol trade places with the Williams family from Weston-super-Mare. The Caddys rank in the top 10 per cent of Britain's wealthy, and live in a seven-bedroom home, while for the eight-strong Williams family, who are among the nation's poorest 10 per cent, the swap means leaving their rented three-bedroom house and enjoying a weekly budget of £1,700 instead of their usual £110

programme.desc: Jessica is stunned to discover after uncovering a trail of feuding and intrigue in the Californian property business, that her niece is the logical prime suspect for the murder of a rich movie heiress in Beverly Hills. Starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica reunites the suspects of a 25-year-old murder case to try to put an end to the mystery once and for all - but the exercise leads to more grim consequences. Crime drama, starring Angela Lansbury, with Donald O'Connor and Anne Francis

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Maggie McCauley, Jessica's former student and now the producer of a TV police show, gets involved in a heated argument with the network programmer who is planning to cancel the series. When her colleague is found dead in suspicious circumstances, Maggie draws upon the deductive skills gleaned from her mentor to repel the accusations against her and find the real killer

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica comes to the aid of old friend and New York police officer James O'Malley, who is investigating a suicide he believes was actually a murder. Starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A former jewel thief and Jessica's friend Dennis Stanton spends a romantic evening with a woman, only to find himself the prime suspect in a puzzling murder. A coin collector is found dead and the sleuth must try to prevent an injustice being done. Keith Michell guest stars, with Angela Lansbury and Dina Merrill

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is invited to her cousin's wedding, but the groom is murdered well before he reaches 'till death us do part'. The amateur sleuth immediately sets out to unmask the culprit and wonders whether the gruesome event could be linked to the release of the bride's brother from a psychiatric institution. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's nephew Grady and his pregnant wife Donna agree to house-sit for the mystery-solving author while she is out of town, and are shocked when they wake one night to discover the body of an amputee in her living room. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is raped at knife-point on a busy subway train in full view of the other passengers, and it soon emerges that the attacker is a serial offender bringing terror to the underground. A further assault later appears to occur, and a fellow passenger intervenes - but the suspected rapist claims to have merely fallen on top of the woman when the train jerked to a halt

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A famous news reporter is raped by two men but fails to prove their guilt at the trial, and decides to challenge the cops' competence with a TV debate, only to be killed by a bomb blast. With one of her previous attackers cleared of the murder, it's up to the police to find his accomplice - and it becomes apparent the journalist is not the only victim in the puzzling case

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A paroled sex offender is suspected of murder when the abused body of an eight-year-old boy is found in a park - but the investigators face a tough challenge when they arrive at the man's house, only to find a mob of angry parents baying for blood outside. Police drama, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler suspects Benson may be in danger during an investigation into a stalker the officers believe to be responsible for the murder of an assistant district attorney. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A banking associate is found murdered, and inquiries reveal he was having an affair with his high-powered boss, who seemingly killed him in a rage. The police build a prosecution case, but it hinges on testimony from the suspect's traumatised teenage daughter - whose delicate mental state makes McCoy uncertain how to proceed

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An assistant district attorney is kidnapped during an investigation into a home invasion that left four members of the same family murdered. However, a further killing prompts McCoy to put his career on the line to track down the culprits. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Annie Parisse

programme.title: Columbo: Make Me a Perfect Murder (1978)
programme.desc: A TV executive's assistant responds to being denied a promotion by killing her boss, then uses her years of experience working on detective shows to create the perfect cover-up. But she reckons without the intervention of Columbo, who begins laying his trap for her while also nursing a neck injury. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and Trish Van Devere

programme.title: Columbo: By Dawn's Early Light (1974)
programme.desc: The commandant of a military academy is outraged by the chairman of the board's plans to admit female cadets, so he stages a fatal accident involving a ceremonial cannon. However, Columbo is not fooled by the deception and sets out to expose the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Patrick McGoohan, Tom Simcox and Mark Wheeler

programme.title: Columbo: Candidate for Crime (1973)
programme.desc: An ambitious senatorial candidate murders his campaign manager for threatening to expose his secret affair. To avoid suspicion, the politician makes the killing look as if he was the intended target of an assassination attempt that went wrong - but ends up having to pit his wits against the slovenly sleuth. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Jackie Cooper, Ken Swofford and Tisha Sterling

programme.title: Columbo: Publish or Perish (1974)
programme.desc: A ruthless publisher hires a hitman to kill a best-selling author who has threatened to sign with a rival company - but reckons without the involvement of the cigar-smoking sleuth, who is determined to put the culprit behind bars. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Mickey Spillane, Jack Cassidy and John Chandler

programme.title: Columbo: Negative Reaction (1974)
programme.desc: A successful photographer wants to get rid of his nagging wife so he can pursue an affair with his assistant. He murders his spouse and makes it look as if she was killed by a kidnapper, and at the same time puts an ex-con in the frame. However, the dogged detective sees through his ruse and proceeds to pick the story to pieces. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Dick Van Dyke, Don Gordon and Antoinette Bower

programme.title: Columbo: Now You See Him (1976)
programme.desc: A stage magician has kept the fact that he is a Nazi war criminal a secret for years. When a nightclub manager threatens to expose him, the illusionist kills him and arranges the perfect alibi - because at the time of the murder, he was apparently performing an escapology act. However, Columbo sets out to uncover the truth. Detective drama, with Peter Falk and Jack Cassidy

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A priest persuades Logan to reopen a decade-old murder case that pits him against an ambitious assistant district attorney, who is determined to keep the truth a secret. Detective drama, starring Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler try to secure a conviction against a piano teacher accused of molesting his students _ but the prime witness refuses to testify, afraid that a video of his ordeal will emerge. The detectives' difficulties are compounded by the discovery of other tapes that could compromise their case and cause further heartache. Christopher Meloni stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A street vendor informs officers he has reason to believe a Romanian immigrant who visits his stall is the victim of serious sexual assault at the hands of her employer. He reveals she left the name of another Romanian, who the investigators subsequently discover could be her aunt - but soon after they visit the presumed relative, she winds up dead. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An investment analyst is found hanged from her four-poster bed, her body covered in piercings, cuts and bruises, leading the police to conclude her death occurred during a kinky sex session. The discovery of a whip containing half a million dollars in cash intrigues the officers further - but they face the task of tracking down the woman's partner to solve the mystery. Crime drama, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman who claims she has been raped turns to the Unit for help, but the team cannot get enough evidence against the prime suspect and is forced to drop the case. However, another victim comes forward six months later with a similar story, making them believe they have made a terrible mistake. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Cassady try to solve the murder of a Muslim man at the hands of a white supremacist group, following a trail of clues that leads to the victim's cousin, who is seemingly connected to a terrorist cell operating in New York. programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. programme.title: Border Security USA
programme.desc: The coastguards come to the rescue when a boat containing migrants from the Dominican Republic becomes stranded at sea

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: Rav Wilding looks at the case of an alcoholic man with a proclivity for parties, who has been rehoused on an estate in Bridlington on the East Yorkshire coast, after living on the streets - much to the consternation of those nearby. When one of his guests is suspected of taking class A drugs it is the last straw for the council's housing officer. In nearby Hull, bored youths are intent on vandalising a newly renovated skatepark. The neighbourhood police officers have some strong words, and then try to encourage them to take part in a new outdoor sports scheme

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A gifted intern learns her true heritage and faces a challenging question. Sci-fi adventure, guest starring Olivia D'Abo and John de Lancie

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett helps his sister Mary spy on her neighbours, while the team investigates the murders of a car-share driver and his passenger. Plus, Junior escorts Tani to a wedding

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: The warlock agrees to help a young druid boy, Daegal, although to do so he has to leave Camelot on a dangerous mission - just as the citadel is playing host to the fearsome Sarrum of Amata. He hopes no one will notice his absence, but as the sky darkens so do Merlin's suspicions - is there more to Daegal than meets the eye? And can a man as ruthless as Sartre be trusted? Fantasy drama, starring Colin Morgan

programme.title: Frontline Police
programme.desc: Rav Wilding goes on patrol with Essex Police in Southend-on-Sea as bad weather causes chaos on the roads, while a dog unit tries to locate a driver who was involved in an accident - and the irate father of one of the crash victims is conducting his own search. The Operational Support Group tries to keep the peace in the pubs and clubs of Chelmsford, a front-line unit chases a pair of suspects, and Special Ops launch three carefully planned drug raids

programme.title: The Force: North East
programme.desc: A call-out to a stabbing proves far from what it seems, while officers are left baffled when a suspected drink driver passes a breathalyser test

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine flirts with a man in a bar who later becomes the prime suspect in the case of two women who have been killed in similar circumstances. At first the evidence against him seems conclusive - but the discovery of an incongruous fingerprint leads to speculation that he is being framed. Starring Marg Helgenberger and featuring Alan Rosenberg, her then real-life husband, in a guest role

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series focuses on Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.desc: Documentary series following the work of neighbourhood policing teams. Officers investigate a suspicious car accident in a remote wildlife park by the Yorkshire coast - and discover that the vehicle was used by a burglar hoping to make a speedy getaway from the scene of the crime. Plus, neighbourhood police from the Humberside force use social media to make the public aware of an arrest, and a team in Bridlington, East Yorkshire, keeps worried onlookers at bay as members of the emergency services tackle a three-storey fire in which two residents are trapped. Presented by Rav Wilding

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: An aggressive teenager in Hull causes problems for her distraught family, and a group of 13-year-old girls are reprimanded over their cyber bullying. programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: Police community support officer Karen patrols Hull city centre, where she encounters a suspected shoplifter. programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: An annual horse fair attracts hundreds of people from the travelling community to Hull, East Yorkshire, but after widespread trouble the previous year the police have decided to take out an injunction aimed at stopping them from congregating anywhere in the city. programme.title: Great SAS Missions
programme.desc: Accounts of daring initiatives by the elite British unit, beginning with a 1941 operation in North Africa in which a commando set up a special unit to create trouble for Rommel's army behind enemy lines. Interviews with former SAS soldiers and cutting-edge graphics are used to tell the story of the raid

programme.title: Great SAS Missions
programme.desc: Using interviews, computer graphics and reconstructions to recount the Second World War SAS mission to infiltrate enemy borders. Heavily armoured cars managed to destroy a number of Hitler's supply lines, and by the time the fighting in North Africa had ended the unit had grown into two full regiments

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen seeks a boyfriend for her socially inept elder sister Laura, so invites nervous horticulturalist Mike to a party. Bob Larbey's comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.title: A Fine Romance

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: A Song for Jenny
programme.desc: Drama, based on Julie Nicholson's book of the same name, which explores her response to her daughter's death at Edgware Road tube station in the July 7 bombings. The rollercoaster of emotions experienced by Julie and her family after the attack is explored; from hope, denial and acceptance, to grief and the desire to honour Jenny. The programme coincides with the forthcoming 10th anniversary of the 7/7 bombings in London and is a tribute to those who lost their lives in the attack

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Former EastEnders bad girl Charlie Brooks (Janine) and retired England rugby union player Ben Cohen (Strictly Come Dancing) tackle a series of fiendishly difficult challenges testing skill, dexterity, reaction, wit and wisdom. Cheered by on friends and family in the studio, they're under intense pressure to hold their nerve and avoid slip-ups inside The Cube as they aim for the £250,000 charity jackpot. Each given nine lives at the start, the contestants can also use 'simplify' and 'trial run' lifelines to make the job a little easier. Phillip Schofield is the host

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings
